stat_block.text: This specialized steel shield features an outer layer of angled wooden or steel plates, which help deflect or redirect incoming ranged projectiles but don't offer any additional protection against melee weapons.

traits.name: Deflecting
traits.text: This shield is designed to block or divert certain types of attacks or weapons. Increase the shield's Hardness against the listed type of attack by 2.
